title: Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agency Appropriations Act, 2027
action: Received in the Senate.
summary: This document outlines the appropriations for various government agencies involved in agricultural and food-related programs, with the primary focus on allocating funds for the fiscal year 2027. The act aims to support and regulate the development of agriculture, rural areas, and food safety through the allocation of these funds.

title: To permanently extend the exemption from the engine compartment portion of the pre-trip vehicle inspection skills testing requirement for school bus drivers, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the Subcommittee on Highways and Transit.
summary: This document proposes a permanent exemption from a specific vehicle safety inspection requirement for school bus drivers in the engine compartment during skills testing. The intention is likely to improve efficiency and reduce administrative burdens for school bus drivers.

title: To amend the Marine Mammal Protection Act of 1972 to allow the transport, purchase, and sale of pelts of, and handicrafts, garments, and art produced from, Southcentral and Southeast Alaska northern sea otters that are taken for subsistence purposes.
action: Subcommittee Hearings Held
summary: This policy aims to amend the Marine Mammal Protection Act to allow the trade of southcentral and southeast Alaskan sea otter products, taken for subsistence purposes. The changes would likely permit the sale and purchase of sea otter items such as pelts, handicrafts, and garments.

title: ARTIST Act

summary: The ARTIST Act is a policy aimed at promoting and supporting artists and creatives across various industries with its initiatives and programs. The details of the policy are not provided, but it implies a focus on artistic and creative talent development and support.
